description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The front features a covered porch with white railings, a paved walkway, and green lawns on either side. The rear of the house includes a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and a children's playset with a slide and swings. Large windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on the upper floor, providing ample natural light. The exterior is finished in light gray with white trim, and there is an attached garage on one side. Outdoor seating and dining areas are present, enhancing the house's suitability for family gatherings and relaxation.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a covered porch, and a backyard featuring a pool and playset. The exterior is light gray with white trim and includes an attached garage and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch with white railings, paved walkway, and green lawns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the attached garage, upper floor windows, and part of the backyard with the pool and playset visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, sun loungers, and children's playset on the lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing outdoor seating, dining area, and the playset with slide and swings.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with white railings, steps, and a central door flanked by windows
